title: Chinatown Nights
writer: Samuel Ornitz, Ben Grauman Kohn, Oliver H.P. Garrett
actors: Wallace Beery, Florence Vidor, Warner Oland
plot: Society woman Joan Fry falls in love with Chuck Riley, the white leader of a powerful gang in Chinatown, and he quickly drags her down into the depths with him. But seeing her so much in love with him causes him to realize that he...
